page.content: The data from Table 1 presents classification, number, time cost (mean ± deviation) in minutes, and P-value for various tumor characteristics, revealing that for a small tumor (≤10 mm), the number is 8 with a time cost of 31.9 ± 5.9 minutes and a P-value of 0.005, while a large tumor (>10 mm) has a number of 6 and a time cost of 46.7 ± 8.2 minutes.

lines.text: The data from Table 1 presents classification, number, time cost (mean ± deviation) in minutes, and P-value for various tumor
characteristics, revealing that for a small tumor (≤10 mm), the number is 8 with a time cost of 31.9 ± 5.9 minutes and a P-value
of 0.005, while a large tumor (>10 mm) has a number of 6 and a time cost of 46.7 ± 8.2 minutes.

page.html:
ClassificationNumberTime cost (mean ± deviation) minutesP-value
SizeSmall tumor (≤10 mm)831.9 ± 5.90.005
Large tumor (>10 mm)646.7 ± 8.2
Location in the esophagusDistal part (>32 cm)840.6 ± 10.50.316
Proximal part (≤32 cm)635.0 ± 9.5
Depth of the tumor originSubmucosal layer841.3 ± 11.30.181
Muscularis mucosa layer634.2 ± 7.4
Total1438.2 ± 10.1

page.content: Regarding location in the esophagus, the distal part (>32 cm) shows a number of 8 with a time cost of 40.6 ± 10.5 minutes and a P-value of 0.316, whereas the proximal part (≤32 cm) has a number of 6 and a time cost of 35.0 ± 9.5 minutes. For depth of tumor origin, the submucosal layer has a number of 8 with a time cost of 41.3 ± 11.3 minutes and a P-value of 0.181, while the muscularis mucosa layer has a number of 6 and a time cost of 34.2 ± 7.4 minutes, culminating in a total of 14 and a mean time cost of 38.2 ± 10.1 minutes. Table 2 details rotation and translation with L2 – 3 showing a mean (sd) of .302 (.158) and reference interval of -.015, .619 for translation, L3 – 4 has a mean (sd) of .292 (.082) and reference interval of .120, .463 for translation, L4 – 5 displays a mean (sd) of .221 (.106) and reference interval of .009, .433 for translation, and L5 – S1 presents a mean (sd) of .186 (.161) with a reference interval of -.136, .507 for translation. The mean (sd) for translation at L2 – 3 is .331 (.147) with a reference interval of .037, .625, L3 – 4 is .262 (139) with a reference interval of -.015, .539, L4 – 5 is .249 (.118) with a reference interval of .012, .485, and L5 – S1 is .158 (.175) with a reference interval of -.191, .508.
